creator: turek.lukas@centrum.cz
text:
Additional information:
I use soft updates at root partition.

The same problem exist in RELENG_6-20061121, but in RELENG_6-20061029 and 
before it's different:

Remount as readonly succeeds, but i get "/: update error: blocks 4 files 1" in 
dmesg, and fsck then reports error:

UNREF FILE I=17639  OWNER=root MODE=100644
SIZE=83 MTIME=Sep  8 23:39 2006
CLEAR? yes

Lukas Turek
